data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Operator-approved rescope+close 2026-07-18. Deterministic half (stratified sample, frozen plan-v3 baseline, 50-ticket FP-control pool, replay_candidate driver seams, pure e3_metrics library, golden tests) DESIGNED+BUILT as WIP on branch calib/6982-e3; intentionally NOT landed on main (driver only drives the rejected batch), so there is by design no referencing commit. The ~450-run LLM batch replay is permanently rejected on cost and superseded by d8a5 (change #798, MERGED) standing criterion_effectiveness.py recorder ($0 marginal cost); history-mining is dead (~4 plan-v3 baselines vs ~200). Rationale + rescoped ACs recorded on-ticket.". Session: 0598b281-0286-4b2c-891c-cc5b4c94ba24.
